ddls:
CREATE TABLE "benchmark_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark the result belongs to */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean value of the result */,
  "error" REAL /* Error of the result */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the result */,
  "std_err" REAL /* Standard error of the result */,
  "min" REAL /* Minimum value of the result */,
  "q1" REAL /* First quartile of the result */,
  "median" REAL /* Median value of the result */,
  "q3" REAL /* Third quartile of the result */,
  "max" REAL /* Maximum value of the result */,
  "op_per_second" REAL /* Operations per second */,
  "ci_99_9_margin" REAL /* 99.9% confidence interval margin */,
  "iterations" INTEGER /* Number of iterations */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark the metadata belongs to */,
  "namespace" TEXT /* Namespace of the benchmark */,
  "categories" TEXT /* Categories of the benchmark */,
  "kurtosis" REAL /* Kurtosis of the result */,
  "m_value" REAL /* M-value of the result */,
  "skewness" REAL /* Skewness of the result */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the result */,
  "logical_group" TEXT /* Logical group of the result */,
  "baseline" INTEGER /* Whether the benchmark is a baseline */,
  "code_size" INTEGER /* Code size of the benchmark */,
  "gen_0" REAL /* Generation 0 garbage collection */,
  "gen_1" REAL /* Generation 1 garbage collection */,
  "gen_2" REAL /* Generation 2 garbage collection */,
  "allocated" INTEGER /* Allocated memory */,
  "memory_used" INTEGER /* Memory used by the benchmark */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the benchmark */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the benchmark was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the benchmark */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., new benchmark, updated benchmark) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
